name: CBSA Assessment and Revenue Management (CARM)
board_use: Importer duty/tax accounting and account-readiness gate.
claim_boundary: Orientation only; does not prove importer registration, duty/tax readiness, or CARM account control.

name: CBSA Import Commercial Goods Into Canada
board_use: Canadian import workflow baseline for go-live checklist design.
claim_boundary: Orientation only; does not replace CBSA, customs broker, or legal advice.

name: CBSA Customs Tariff 2026
board_use: Canadian tariff-classification evidence source for the compliance lane.
claim_boundary: Orientation only; tariff classification needs qualified review.

name: CFIA Automated Import Reference System
board_use: CFIA-regulated commodity requirements lookup for food-import review.
claim_boundary: Reference only; CFIA AIRS and applicable law need qualified review before product claims.

name: CFIA AIRS Verification Service
board_use: Potential future API-style verification integration requiring access credentials.
claim_boundary: Access and usage rights are not proven; AVS credentials remain an implementation blocker.

name: Global Affairs Canada Import Controls and Import Permits
claim_boundary: Orientation only; product applicability and permits require qualified review.

name: Justice Laws Import Control List
board_use: Legal reference point for controlled imports.
claim_boundary: Reference only; legal interpretation requires qualified counsel or compliance reviewer.

name: Consolidated Canadian Autonomous Sanctions List
claim_boundary: Screening evidence must be dated and reviewed; source presence alone does not clear parties.

name: ISED Trade Data Online
board_use: Canadian trade-data source for market and source research.
claim_boundary: Data availability only; market size and demand claims need a dated model.

name: Canadian Importers Database
board_use: Importer discovery and buyer-research seed list.
claim_boundary: Discovery only; does not prove buyer validation or supplier recommendation.

name: CBSA Licensed Customs Brokers
board_use: Source for finding a qualified Canadian customs broker review lane.
claim_boundary: Directory only; does not create a broker relationship or signoff.

name: BizPaL
board_use: Canadian permit and licence discovery lane by location and business activity.
claim_boundary: Discovery only; actual permits/licences need jurisdiction-specific confirmation.

name: Canada.ca Planning a Business
board_use: Canadian business planning and structure readiness reference.
claim_boundary: Planning reference only; does not replace accounting, tax, or legal advice.

name: BDC Financial Plan Template
board_use: Canadian financial-planning structure for funding and runway assumptions.
claim_boundary: Template reference only; financial projections need founder/accountant review.

name: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada PIPEDA Requirements in Brief
claim_boundary: Privacy orientation only; legal/privacy counsel review remains required before launch.

name: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security Baseline Cyber Security Controls
board_use: Canadian small/medium organization cybersecurity baseline for launch controls.
claim_boundary: Security baseline orientation only; implementation and audit evidence are separate gates.
